prompt: Create a cinematic sci-fi character portrait in a 16:9 widescreen frame. A female cyborg or android stands centered in a medium close-up on an offshore industrial platform at sea during a stormy sunset. Her face is deliberately obscured by one large opaque square censor block centered over the entire face, colored with a dark-to-warm brown vertical gradient, covering from the forehead down to the upper chest area and hiding all facial features. Visible details around the block include blonde hair pulled back in a messy bun with loose strands, metallic cybernetic ear and temple hardware on both sides, an exposed mechanical neck with dark cables and chrome components, a worn red leather high-collar vest or jacket, and scratched gunmetal shoulder armor. The background shows a rough ocean horizon, heavy dark clouds, the low sun glowing near the right side and reflecting across the water, railings, pipes, platforms, small industrial lights, and blurred offshore structures. Use dramatic cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, realistic textures, moody teal-orange color grading, rain-worn metal surfaces, high detail, photorealistic sci-fi concept art, no text, no logos, no watermark.
